query_or_source: Aronu Tables 3–6 columns labeled pCO2 model
reason_rejected_or_gap: Model predictions placed next to measured columns; excluded from row extraction.

query_or_source: Lee et al. (1976) values after +0.04 loading correction
reason_rejected_or_gap: Correction reported by Hilliard is not an original measurement. Original and corrected series must be separate; no silent overwrite.

query_or_source: Values copied from later ePC-SAFT/eNRTL/model papers
reason_rejected_or_gap: Later papers may reproduce ranges, digitized points or predictions without original basis/uncertainty. Used only as provenance leads.

query_or_source: Model-predicted speciation curves in thermodynamic papers
reason_rejected_or_gap: Not independent validation; excluded.

query_or_source: Separate MEA and MEAH+ inferred from Hilliard/Böttinger NMR aggregate
reason_rejected_or_gap: Rapid proton exchange makes the reported signal an aggregate; separation would be balance/model inference.

query_or_source: Molecular CO2 set to zero because below NMR detection
reason_rejected_or_gap: Below detection is not a zero measurement.

query_or_source: Single-frequency microwave permittivity relabeled ε0
reason_rejected_or_gap: Static/Born permittivity requires zero-frequency limit or justified dispersion extrapolation.

query_or_source: Agieienko εs described as directly measured DC permittivity
reason_rejected_or_gap: εs is fitted/extrapolated from 0.2–89 GHz dispersion; retained with fitted classification.

query_or_source: MEAH+Cl− vapor-pressure/activity data as MEAH+/MEACOO− target-pair activity
reason_rejected_or_gap: Counterion is chloride; analog only, not target-ion evidence.

query_or_source: Direct individual MEAH+ or MEACOO− activity coefficients
reason_rejected_or_gap: No qualified direct target-ion dataset located. Individual ion activities are convention-dependent and no source-complete target measurement was found.

query_or_source: Absorber/process-monitoring pH traces
reason_rejected_or_gap: Equilibrium not established and calibration/scale often absent.

query_or_source: pH computed from model speciation or charge balance
reason_rejected_or_gap: Model-derived, not electrochemical evidence.

query_or_source: Loaded-MEA pH without buffer standards/electrode scale/ionic-strength handling
reason_rejected_or_gap: Basis cannot be reconstructed.

query_or_source: Integral heat used as differential heat, or vice versa
reason_rejected_or_gap: Different thermodynamic observables; must retain definition and sign convention.

query_or_source: N2O solubility relabeled CO2 solubility
reason_rejected_or_gap: N2O is analog evidence only.

query_or_source: Hilliard Table 13.4-2 default σ values treated as instrument uncertainties
reason_rejected_or_gap: These are regression defaults unless independently supported by source methods.

query_or_source: Abstract-only/index-only values
reason_rejected_or_gap: No table/method/basis; excluded.

query_or_source: Review-only data ranges
reason_rejected_or_gap: Useful for search mapping, not measurements.

query_or_source: Böttinger one-page preview or incomplete source
reason_rejected_or_gap: Cannot establish all rows/method/uncertainty.

query_or_source: Manual transcription and NIST ThermoML from same DOI placed in different folds
reason_rejected_or_gap: Duplicate representation of same experiment; use source_id/split_group to keep together.
